decisions.rationale: Centers box without making it full-width; matches topic list inset
Tables ignore padding for visual centering; margin+explicit width required
CSS custom variables defined in :root may not resolve in Discourse theme preview context
Discourse auto-sets --header-offset via JS; manual padding doubled the offset creating cream gap above sidebar+banner
Sidebar/content flex gap was true source of banner left gap — not .container padding as initially assumed

next_action: Ask user to update theme and confirm if banner top gap is resolved. If confirmed, run /gsd-plan-phase 4 for Right Column.
